title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!
